scripts.build: bun run build:covers && bun run build:blog && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/generate-og.ts && bun ../../node_modules/@vertz/cli/dist/vertz.js build
scripts.deploy: bun run build && vtzx wrangler deploy --define DEPLOY_VERSION:"'$(date +%s)'" --define PRESENCE_WS_URL:"'wss://vertz.dev/__presence'" && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/pre-warm.ts

vertz.title: Vertz — The Agent-Native Framework
vertz.description: One schema derives your database, API, and UI. Fully typed end-to-end. Built for agents to write, humans to ship.
head: <link rel="alternate" type="text/plain" href="/llms.txt" />
